Fig. 5: Real-world demonstrations of OMNI-PoseX in daily manipulation tasks. Top: Category-level zero-shot grasping across unseen object instances, validating cross-category generalization under geometric and appearance variations. Bottom: Articulated object manipulation (drawer and cabinet door), requiring stable 6D pose tracking to support constrained motion and contact-consistent execution.
